dosingInfo.rawDosageText: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION BEFORE USE, READ THOROUGHLY THE BAUSCH HEALTH SMALL PARTICLE AEROSOL GENERATOR SPAG-2 INSTRUCTIONS FOR USE FOR SMALL PARTICLE AEROSOL GENERATOR OPERATING INSTRUCTIONS. AEROSOLIZED RIBAVIRIN FOR INHALATION SOLUTION, USP HAS NOT BEEN TESTED WITH ANY OTHER AEROSOL GENERATING DEVICE. The recommended treatment regimen is 20 mg/mL Ribavirin for Inhalation Solution, USP as the starting solution in the drug reservoir of the SPAG-2 unit, with continuous aerosol administration fo
